_note: All hardware-dependent values (UART ports, GPIO pins) are set to null until wired. The code will error clearly if a null value is used at runtime.
active_model_note: Default model, Used in help text only. Overridden at runtime by --model flag.
resolution_note: Camera capture resolution [width, height] in pixels. Must match frame_width_px and frame_height_px in the mission block.
framerate_note: Camera frames per second. 30 is the IMX708 default.
board_roi_note: Optional [x, y, w, h] crop rectangle for OCR mode. Limits Tesseract to the board area only. null = full frame.
yolo_weights_note: Path to the exported NCNN model directory (contains *.param and *.bin). See README: Training walkthrough.
yolo_conf_note: YOLO detection confidence threshold (0.0-1.0). Detections below this score are ignored. Override at runtime with --conf flag.
display_note: Show live OpenCV window during inference and mission. Set to false on a headless Pi with no monitor.
save_output_note: Automatically save every annotated frame to output_dir. Enabled per-run with --save flag instead.
output_dir_note: Directory for saved annotated frames (created automatically if it does not exist).

mission._note: All settings for the autonomous drone mission (python main.py --mode mission).
mission.mavlink_uart_note: UART port connecting the Pi to the ArduPilot flight controller. Example: /dev/ttyAMA0. Run 'ls /dev/ttyAMA*' on the Pi to list available ports. See requirements_pi.txt for UART setup.
mission.mavlink_baud_note: Baud rate for the ArduPilot MAVLink connection. Must match SERIALx_BAUD on the flight controller (57600 is the ArduPilot default for companion computers).
mission.sensor_uart_note: UART port connecting the Pi to the MicoAir MTF-02P optical flow and range sensor. Must be a different port from mavlink_uart. Example: /dev/ttyAMA2.
mission.sensor_baud_note: Baud rate for the MTF-02P sensor. Fixed at 115200 by the hardware — do not change.
mission.takeoff_altitude_m_note: Target hover altitude in metres after arming. ~1.5m (5 feet) gives enough clearance for indoor scanning.
mission.scan_yaw_rate_dps_note: Yaw spin rate in degrees per second during the board scan. 20 dps = one full rotation in 18 seconds. Slower = more time per frame, less likely to miss the board.
mission.scan_timeout_s_note: If no dirty board is detected within this many seconds, the drone aborts the scan and returns home.
mission.approach_stop_dist_m_note: The drone stops its forward approach when the MTF-02P range sensor reads this distance (metres) to the board. Set to the length of the wiper arm reach.
mission.approach_kp_note: Proportional gain for lateral and vertical camera-centering. Higher = more aggressive correction. Tune if the drone oscillates sideways.
mission.approach_kp_forward_note: Proportional gain for forward speed during Phase 2 approach. vx = kp_forward * (dist - stop_dist). Higher = faster initial approach, slows naturally to zero at stop distance.
mission.align_threshold_px_note: Phase 1 alignment threshold in pixels. Drone will not begin moving forward until the board centre is within this many pixels of frame centre in both axes.
mission.approach_max_speed_ms_note: Hard cap on velocity in any axis during approach (m/s). The proportional controller will never exceed this regardless of distance.
mission.approach_cautious_speed_ms_note: Forward speed used when the range sensor has not yet returned a valid reading. Intentionally very slow — the drone creeps forward until the sensor confirms distance.
mission.pump_gpio_pin_note: BCM GPIO pin number on the Pi wired to the pump relay IN terminal. Example: 17. Assign once the relay is physically connected.
mission.pump_duration_s_note: How long to run the pump during the CLEAN state (seconds). Runs before the wiper sweep.
mission.frame_width_px_note: Frame width used by the approach proportional controller. Keep in sync with the resolution setting above.
mission.frame_height_px_note: Frame height used by the approach proportional controller. Keep in sync with the resolution setting above.

range_sensor._note: VL53L3CX ToF forward range sensor on Pi I2C bus. Wiring: VIN→3.3V(pin1), GND→GND(pin6), SDA→GPIO2(pin3), SCL→GPIO3(pin5). Enable I2C: sudo raspi-config → Interface Options → I2C → Enable. Verify: sudo i2cdetect -y 1 (should show 0x29).
range_sensor.i2c_address_note: Default I2C address is 0x29 (decimal 41). This field takes a decimal integer — if your sensor was remapped (e.g. to 0x2A), enter 42. Change only if the XSHUT pin was used to remap the address.

wiper._note: Wiper arm settings (wiper.py). Actuator type TBD — implement wiper.py once mechanism is confirmed. The arm extends against the board, sweeps, then retracts.
wiper.wiper_gpio_pin_note: BCM GPIO pin number on the Pi wired to the wiper arm control wire. Example: 18. Assign once the mechanism is physically connected.
wiper.home_angle_note: Wiper arm position when fully retracted and clear of the board (degrees, 0-180).
wiper.press_angle_note: Wiper arm position when extended and pressed against the board. Tune based on physical arm geometry.
wiper.sweep_left_note: Left limit of the wipe sweep arc (degrees). Set to keep the wipe within the board edges.
wiper.sweep_right_note: Right limit of the wipe sweep arc (degrees). Set to keep the wipe within the board edges.
wiper.sweep_passes_note: Number of left-right passes during a single wipe cycle. More passes = cleaner board, longer cleaning time.
wiper.sweep_speed_note: Delay in seconds between each 1-degree step during the sweep. Lower = faster sweep. 0.01 = ~1.5 seconds per full sweep at 150-degree range.
